Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation in the entire event log
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' out of all cases

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation occurrences across all cases
Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' activities

Name: Percentage of variants that include SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' out of all cases

Name: Number of times SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation is directly preceded by SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' activities

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation occurrences that are followed by SW-Awaiting EIC Decision
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' out of all 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation relative to SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation out of all activities occurring after SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Number of variants where SW-Reviewer Agreed is immediately followed by SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation
Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' occurs

Name: Percentage of cases containing SW-Reviewer Agreed that eventually reach SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation compared to SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion
Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation that occurs without any prior reviewer agreement (i.e., not preceded by SW-Reviewer Agreed, RW-Reviewer Agreed, or RSW-Reviewer Agreed)
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' out of all cases where 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' does not happen

Name: Number of times SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation appears in variants ending with a rejection decision (e.g., SW-EIC Reject, SW-EIC Reject & Resubmit)
Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' activities for cases where activity 'SW-EIC Reject' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation occurrences that lead to a major revision outcome (e.g., SW-EIC Major Revision)
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' out of all 'SW-EIC Major Revision'

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation in comparison to other \awaiting\ states such as SW-Awaiting EIC Decision and SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion
Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation that is part of long-running variants (performance > 1,000,000 time units) versus short-running variants
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' out of all cases

Name: Number of cases where SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation occurs more than once
Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' activities

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation events that are followed within 7 days by an AE recommendation activity (e.g., SW-AE Recommendation overdue or transition to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision)
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' out of all 'SW-AE Recommendation overdue'

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation in cases that originated from an initial SW-Reviewer Agreed versus those originating from repeated reviewer invitations or reminders
Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation that appears in variants involving at least one reviewer decline (e.g., SW-Reviewer Declined)
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Declined'

Name: Ratio of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation occurrences to total reviewer-related activities (including SW-Reviewer Agreed, SW-Reviewer Declined, SW-Reviewer No Response, etc.)
Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' occurs
